SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Show cameras on map
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Display ALPR camera markers from dontgetflocked.com

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Enable camera avoidance routing
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Route around known ALPR camera zones

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Avoidance radius
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Radius around route to check for cameras (50-500m)

SeekBarPreference.android:title: Alert distance
SeekBarPreference.android:summary: Distance at which to alert about nearby cameras (100-1000m)

SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:title: Connect CYD hardware (BLE)
SwitchPreferenceCompat.android:summary: Connect to Can You Detect hardware via Bluetooth Low Energy
